verse_text: But while he thought about these things, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream, saying, 'Joseph, son of David, do not be afraid to take to you Mary your wife, for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Spirit.

links.context: The Spirit of Christ declares the intimacy between the Son and the Holy Spirit. The Son becomes incarnate by the Holy Spirit ([[MAT.1:20]]) and in turn sends the Holy Spirit from the Father into the world ([[JOH.15:26]]; 16:7).
